research.dataModel: users, organizations, repositories, branches, commits, pull_requests, issues, comments, reactions, labels, milestones, releases, packages, actions_workflows, workflow_runs
research.summary: GitHub: code hosting + collaboration platform. Repositories, pull requests, issues, GitHub Actions, code search, organizations, teams, profiles, releases, packages, Pages.

stackNotes: No rust-platform template ships with the onboarding skill — workspace was scaffolded directly during onboarding (Cargo.toml + crates/api/).
Frontend (Next.js + TypeScript) lives in web/ and is scaffolded by the build loop on first iteration.
All ralph loops (inspect, architecture, build, qa) run via `codex exec`; no Anthropic API key required.
Search starts on Postgres + pg_trgm; can swap in a dedicated code indexer later.

google-oauth.detail: Keys present in .env. JS origins + redirect URIs documented in .env comments.

google-oauth-consent-screen.error: User must verify in Google Cloud Console: Authorized JS origins, redirect URIs, and consent screen Published OR test user added (TEST_ACCOUNT_EMAIL).

cloudflare.detail: Token + Zone ID present in .env. Zone: namuh.co

database-url.error: Auto-filled by scripts/preflight.sh once RDS Postgres is provisioned.
